title: 12 Hours With Venezuelan Doctors Searching for Earthquake Survivors
summary_full: A medical team set out from the capital to rescue people in the hardest-hit part of the disaster zone, La Guaira. They found silence in the ruins instead.
summary_public: A medical team set out from the capital to rescue people in the hardest-hit part of the disaster zone, La Guaira. They found silence in the ruins instead.
